items.meaning_kr: 하루 동안에 기온, 기압, 습도 등이 바뀌는 차이
items.meaning_en: A range of changes in daily temperature, air pressure, humidity, etc.
items.e_definition: A range of changes in daily temperature, air pressure, humidity, etc.

items.meaning_kr: 하루 동안 있었던 일을 적은 글

items.meaning_en: An island country located in East Asia, known for its advanced manufacturing and electronic industries, and high economic standard; the official language is Japanese and the capital is Tokyo.
items.e_definition: An island country located in East Asia, known for its advanced manufacturing and electronic industries, and high economic standard; the official language is Japanese and the capital is Tokyo.

items.meaning_en: A language that Japanese people speak.
items.e_definition: A language that Japanese people speak.

items.meaning_kr: 한 부분. 또는 전체 중에서 얼마
items.meaning_en: One portion of something, or part of the whole.
items.e_definition: One portion of something, or part of the whole.

items.meaning_kr: 모든 움직임이 흐트러짐 없이 질서 있게 맞음
사람이 태어나서 죽을 때까지의 전 삶
한 가지 일을 하여 두 가지 이익을 얻음
items.e_word: killing two birds with one stone

items.meaning_en: The act of paying a sum of money all at once.
items.e_definition: The act of paying a sum of money all at once.

items.meaning_en: Ethnic foods that have originated in Japan.
items.e_definition: Ethnic foods that have originated in Japan.

items.meaning_en: A restaurant that sells Japanese dishes.
items.e_definition: A restaurant that sells Japanese dishes.
